description_long: This is a stylized, compact airplane with a predominantly red fuselage and wings, accented by white and blue roundels on each wing. The wings are straight and extend outward from the midsection, with a slight dihedral angle and no visible winglets. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage, featuring a faceted, transparent canopy that appears to be single-seat and fully enclosed. The airplane has twin tail booms extending from the wings to the rear, each ending in a vertical stabilizer, forming an H-tail configuration. The engines are mounted on the wings near the fuselage, and the landing gear is not visible, suggesting it may be retractable or omitted in this representation.
description: A compact, red airplane with straight mid-mounted wings, twin tail booms, and a forward, enclosed cockpit. Blue and white roundels decorate the wings, and the design features an H-tail configuration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and symmetrical straight wings with roundels.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the twin tail booms, H-tail, and the placement of engines near the fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, H-tail structure, and the open space between the tail booms.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the twin tail booms, H-tail, and the cockpit's forward placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and a slight dihedral angle; no winglets or variable geometry present.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted near the wing roots.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers connected by horizontal stabilizers at the rear of twin tail booms.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable or omitted.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat, fully enclosed cockpit with a faceted transparent canopy.
